commentaries.author: Augustine of Hippo
commentaries.content: But the young man went away sad, so anyone can see how far he kept those commandments of the law. I think he spoke with more pride than truth when he answered that he had kept them. Letter , To Hilarius.

commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: We must recollect, that to the faithful observers of the Mosaic law, not only present goods were given, but the happiness of a future life promised. Hence our Lord with reason inquired, whether he had kept the commandments. The innocent life of this young man is deserving of our imitation. (Ven. Bede)

commentaries.author: Jerome
commentaries.content: He who declared that he had observed all the commandments had already yielded to the power of riches from the very outset. Letter , To Julian.

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
